Message: Function 'New-LockFile' has verb that could change system state. Therefore, the function has to support 'ShouldProcess'.
Function 'Remove-LockFile' has verb that could change system state. Therefore, the function has to support 'ShouldProcess'.
'New-LockFile' calls ShouldProcess/ShouldContinue but does not have the ShouldProcess attribute.
'Remove-LockFile' calls ShouldProcess/ShouldContinue but does not have the ShouldProcess attribute.
